title: Ace’s Fate and the End of the War: Turning Point
description: In the Marineford War storyline, this section centers on Dadan, Luffy, Ace as the scene develops across pages 18–19.
scene: This scene advances the Marineford War conflict through Dadan, Luffy, Ace, focusing on the immediate stakes of ace’s fate and the end of the war: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: Did you think I was dead?

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: Don't go killing me off, idiot!!

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: I promise! I will never die!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: His name is gold D. Ace.

summary: This scene advances the Marineford War conflict through Dadan, Luffy, Ace, focusing on the immediate stakes of ace’s fate and the end of the war: turning point.
